visual_description: A low-angle, close-up shot focuses on the lower legs and feet of a person in a dimly lit, dark environment. The person is wearing dark, rugged boots and plaid pants. They are standing on a ground covered in what appears to be pine needles or dry leaves. The background is almost completely black, with the silhouettes of a large crowd of people faintly visible behind the main subject. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on the boots. The audio is filled with the quiet, ambient sounds of a large group of people in a still, outdoor environment. A low, indistinct murmur of many voices creates a sense of anticipation and unease. The sound of rustling, like dry leaves or pine needles underfoot, is prominent, suggesting movement through a forest floor. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the person, who is now seen to be a woman with dark hair. She is crouching or kneeling on the ground, looking down with a determined or concerned expression. The crowd behind her is more visible, showing a group of people standing in the dark, watching her. The lighting remains low and atmospheric,
